title: Dramatic moment police gets struck by car
description: Bodycam footage has captured the moment a police officer was struck by a vehicle from behind while conducting a traffic stop in Mamaroneck, New York on Sunday. Local authorities said a 24-year-old driver rear-ended a patrol car, pushing it into the stopped vehicle, which then struck the trooper.  Police said the officer was taken to hospital with minor injuries and later released, while the 24-year-old driver was also evaluated of minor pain. #police #carcrash #NewYork #worldnews
